mxCell.value: Controller layer (@RestController) --- HTTP endpoints, without business logic

«@RestController»
AuthController

- authService : AuthService
- jwtUtil : JwtUtil

+ POST /auth/login
+ POST /auth/refresh
+ GET /auth/me
+ POST /auth/logout
+ POST /auth/register
Service layer (@Service) --- business logic, transactions, validations

«@Service»
AuthService

- userRepo: UserRepository
- refreshTokenRepo
- passwordEncoder
- jwtUtil : JwtUtil

+ authenticate(dto) : AUthResponse
+ refresh(token) : AuthResponse
+ register(dto) : User
+ logout (userId) : void

«@Service»
AppointmentService

- appointmentRepo
- availabilityValidator
- notificationDispacher

+ createAppointment(dto)
+ updateAppointment(id, dto)
+ cancel(id) : void

«@Service»«critical»
AvailabilityValidatorService

- appointmentRepo : 
AppointmentRepository

+ checkDoctor( id, start, end)
+ checkRoom(id, start, end)
+ checkEquipmentReq(svcId, ... ) : throws ResourceConflictException
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(90, 58, 20));">Additional Repositories</font>

«@JpaRepository<User, UUID»
UserRepository
.
findByUsername(username): Optional<User>
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(207, 180, 147));">Additional Entities</font>
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Role</font>

ADMIN, 
DOCTOR,
PATIENT
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">RefreshToken</font>

+ id : UUID
+ user : User
+ token : String
+ expiryDate : Instant
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Doctor</font>

+ id : UUID
+ user : User (login)
+ specialty : String
+ standardDurationMinutes : int
+ weeklySchedule : List<WorkingHours>

«Flyway migrations»
PostgreSQL (DB)

tabele: users, roles, doctors,
rooms, equipment, services,
patients, appointments,
consultation_records,
audit_log, notifications`

«@EnableWebSecurity»
SecurityConfig

- JwtAuthenticationFilter
- BCryptPasswordEncoder
permitAll: /auth/**, /public/**
authenticated: restul API-ului

«@EnableWebSocketMessageBroker»
WebSocketConfig

endpoint: /we (SockJS) 
broker: /topic - /queue
broadcast schimbări status
programare către toți clienții
conectați (sincronizare live)
Infrastructure --- Redis - WebSocket config - Security - Database

«@Service»
AppointmentStateService

- appointmentRepo
- transitions
: Map<Status,Set<Status>>

+ changeStatus(id,newStatus)
+ isValidTransition(from,to)
: boolean
WorkingSchedule

+ id : UUID
+ dayOfWeek : DayOfWeek
+ startTime, endTime : LocalTime

+ id : UUID
+ name : String

«@Service»
ConsultationRecordService

- recordRepo
- appointmentRepo

+ create(dto): ConsultationRecord
+ update(id,dto)
» blocat dacă COMPLETED

+ id : UUID
+ name : String

+ id : UUID
+ name : String
+ price : BigDecimal
+ defaultDurationMinutes : int
+ requiredEquipment : List<Equipment>
Enums (backend/enums/)

«enum»
AppointmentStatus

«enum»
NotificationType

«enum»
NotificationStauts
Config & Util (backend/config/, backend/util/)

«@ConfigurationProperties»
JwtProperties

secret: String
accessTokenExpiry: long
refreshTokenExpiry: long
TotpProperties
«@ConfigurationProperties» encryptionKey: String issuer: String

«@Configuration @EnableAsync»
AsyncConfig

thread pool executor
folosit de NotificationDispatcher

«@Configuration»
JacksonConfig

ObjectMapper bean
JavaTimeModule · ISO dates

«AttributeConverter<String,String>»
AesEncryptionUtil

+ encrypt(value): String
+ decrypt(value): String
» folosit pe Patient.cnp

«@RestControllerAdvice»
GlobalExceptionHandler

ResourceNotFoundException → 404
ConflictException → 409
UnprocessableEntityException → 422
MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400

«enum»
AuditAction

«@EnableCaching» (optional)
Redis

Cache pentru rapoarte
frecvent accesate
@Cacheable pe ReportService
(NTH-BE-007, nice-to-have)

«append-only»
AuditLog

+ id : UUID
+ user : User
+ action : AuditAction
+ entityName : String
+ entityId : UUID
+ timestamp : LocalDateTime
Notification

+ id : UUID
+ recipient : String
+ type : NotificationType
+ status : NotificationStatus
+ retryCount : int
+ payload : String
Entity Layer(@Entity) - JPA Mapped

«@Entity» «@Table(users)»
User

+ id : UUID
+ username, passwordHash
+ email : String
+ role : Role
+ enabled : boolean

«@Entity»
Appointment

+ id : UUID
+ patient, doctor, room, service
+ startTime, endTime : LocalDateTime
+ status : AppointmentStatus
+ @Version version : Long

«@Entity»%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22swimlane%3BfontStyle%3D1%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BchildLayout%3DstackLayout%3Bhorizontal%3D1%3BstartSize%3D50%3BhorizontalStack%3D0%3BresizeParent%3D1%3BresizeParentMax%3D0%3BresizeLast%3D0%3Bcollapsible%3D1%3BmarginBottom%3D0%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfillColor%3Dlight-dark(%2300994D%2C%23894227)%3BfontColor%3D%23ffffff%3BstrokeColor%3Dlight-dark(%233700CC%2C%23894227)%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bfont-weight%3A%20400%3B%20text-align%3A%20left%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B%C2%AB%40Entity%C2%BB%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bbr%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3BAppointment%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%22160%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20x%3D%22790%22%20y%3D%221560%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%223%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22text%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bcolor%3A%20rgb(34%2C%2034%2C%2034)%3B%20font-family%3A%20Consolas%2C%20%26amp%3Bquot%3BCourier%20New%26amp%3Bquot%3B%2C%20monospace%3B%20font-size%3A%2010.3px%3B%20white-space%3A%20pre-line%3B%20background-color%3A%20rgb(255%2C%20255%2C%20255)%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B%2B%20id%20%3A%20UUID%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20patient%2C%20doctor%2C%20room%2C%20service%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20startTime%2C%20endTime%20%3A%20LocalDateTime%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20status%20%3A%20AppointmentStatus%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20%40Version%20version%20%3A%20Long%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2280%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%224%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22line%3BstrokeWidth%3D1%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3BspacingTop%3D-1%3BspacingLeft%3D3%3BspacingRight%3D3%3Brotatable%3D0%3BlabelPosition%3Dright%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BstrokeColor%3Dinherit%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%228%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%22130%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%225%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22text%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3B%22%20value%3D%22-%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2222%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%22138%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E«@GDPR»
Patient

+ id : UUID
+ firstName, lastName
+ cnp : String « @Convert AES »
+ dateOfBirth, email, phone
+ allergies, medicalHistory

«@Entity» «read-only after COMPLETED» %3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22swimlane%3BfontStyle%3D1%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BchildLayout%3DstackLayout%3Bhorizontal%3D1%3BstartSize%3D50%3BhorizontalStack%3D0%3BresizeParent%3D1%3BresizeParentMax%3D0%3BresizeLast%3D0%3Bcollapsible%3D1%3BmarginBottom%3D0%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfillColor%3Dlight-dark(%2300994D%2C%23894227)%3BfontColor%3D%23ffffff%3BstrokeColor%3Dlight-dark(%233700CC%2C%23894227)%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bfont-weight%3A%20400%3B%20text-align%3A%20left%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B%C2%AB%40Entity%C2%BB%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bbr%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3BAppointment%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%22160%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20x%3D%22790%22%20y%3D%221560%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%223%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22text%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bcolor%3A%20rgb(34%2C%2034%2C%2034)%3B%20font-family%3A%20Consolas%2C%20%26amp%3Bquot%3BCourier%20New%26amp%3Bquot%3B%2C%20monospace%3B%20font-size%3A%2010.3px%3B%20white-space%3A%20pre-line%3B%20background-color%3A%20rgb(255%2C%20255%2C%20255)%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B%2B%20id%20%3A%20UUID%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20patient%2C%20doctor%2C%20room%2C%20service%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20startTime%2C%20endTime%20%3A%20LocalDateTime%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20status%20%3A%20AppointmentStatus%26lt%3Bbr%2F%26gt%3B%2B%20%40Version%20version%20%3A%20Long%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2280%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%224%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22line%3BstrokeWidth%3D1%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3BspacingTop%3D-1%3BspacingLeft%3D3%3BspacingRight%3D3%3Brotatable%3D0%3BlabelPosition%3Dright%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BstrokeColor%3Dinherit%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%228%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%22130%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%225%22%20parent%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22text%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3B%22%20value%3D%22-%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2222%22%20width%3D%22270%22%20y%3D%22138%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E
ConsulationRecord

+ id : UUID
+ appointment : Appointment (1-1)
+ presentationMotive, anamnesis
+ clinicalExam, diagnosis
+ prescription : String
findByName(name)
findByToken(token)
findAll / findById
findAll / findById
findAll / findById
findAll (with requiredEquipment)

«INSERT / SELECT only» 
AuditLogRepository
findByUserAndDateRange(..)
NotificationRepository

findByStatus(FAILED)
findByRecipientId(id)
Repository / DAO Layer (extends JpaRepository) - Spring Data JPA

«@JpaRepository<Appointment, UUID»
«critical»
AppointmentRepository
.

+ findOverlappingForDoctor(...)
+ findOverlappingForRoom(...)
+ findOverlappingForEquipment(...)

«@JpaRepository<Patient, UUID
PatientRepository
.
+ searchByNameOrPhoneOrCnp (keyword) : List<Patient>

«@JpaRepository<ConsultationRecord, UUID
ConsultationRecordRepository
.
+ findByAppointmentId( id): Optional<ConsulationRecord>
Additional Services

«@Service» 
PatientService

- patientRepo
- aesEncryptor: AesEncryptionUtil

+ search (keyword): List
+ create(dto) / update (id, dto)

«@Service» 
DOctorService / RoomService / EquipmentService ClinicalServiceService
- corespunzatorul Repository

+ getAll / getById / create
+ update / delete
(CRUD resurce clinica)

«@Service» 
ReportService
- appointmentRepo

+ occupancyRate (range)
+ noShowReport (range)
+ salesReport (range)

«@Service» 
PdfExportService
( iText / PDFBox)
+ export(raportData): byte[]

«@Service» 
ExcelExportService
(Apache POI)
+ export (reportData) : byte[] numere native, nu text

«@Service» 
EmailNotifcationProvider
SmsNotificationProvider

- mailSender / smsClient
(JavaMailSender / Twilio)
+ send (to, template, payload)

«@AspectAOP»  
AuditLoggingAspect
- auditLogRepo : AuditLogRepository

+ @Around logAccess(joinPoint)
pe ConsultationController

«@RestController»
AppointmentController

- appointmentService
: AppointmentService

+ POST /appointments
+ PUT /appointments/{id}
+ PATCH /appointments/{id}/status
+ GET /appointments?doctorId&roomId
+ DELETE /appointments/{id}

«@RestController»
PatientController

- patientService
: PatientService

+ GET /patients?search=
+ GET /patients/{id}
+ POST /patients
+ PUT /patients/{id}

«@RestController»
«@PreAuthorize MEDIC, ADMIN»
PatientController

- patientService
: PatientService

+ GET /patients?search=
+ GET /patients/{id}
+ POST /patients
+ PUT /patients/{id}

«@RestController»
«@PreAuthorize MEDIC, ADMIN»
ConsultationController

- recordService
: ConsultationRecordService

+ GET /appointments/{id}/record
+ POST /appointments/{id}/record
+ PUT /appointments/{id}/record

«@RestController»
«@PreAuthorize ADMIN»
ReportController

- reportService : ReportService
- pdfExportService
- excelExportService

+ GET /reports/occupancy
+ GET /reports/no-show
+ GET /reports/sales
+ GET /reports/export/pdf
+ GET /reports/export/xlsx
Additional Controllers

«@RestController»
DoctorController
- doctorService : DoctorService

+ GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
/doctors[/{id}]

«@RestController»
RoomController
- roomService : RoomService

+ GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
/rooms[/{id}]

«@RestController»
EquipmentController
- equipmentService : EquipmentService

+ GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
/equipment[/{id}]

«@RestController»
ClinicalServiceController
- clinicalServiceService

+ GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
/services[/{id}]
+ links Equipment obligatoriu

«@RestController»
«@PreAuthorize ADMIN»
AuditController

- auditLogRepo
: AuditLogRepository
+ GET /audit-log?user&date

«@RestController»
«Public, fara Auth»
PublicBookingController
- appointmentService

+ GET /public/appt/{token}
+ POST /public/appt/{token}/confirm
+ POST /public/appt/{token}/cancel
